title: AntiHunger
body:
# AntiHunger

Always stay at full saturation. When active, no player will ever lose hunger again. This can be useful for minigame servers or lobbies.

> This plugin has been functional on 1.21.4 and can be expected to work in upcoming versions as well as prior ones, even when not listed.

## Setup

No special setup is needed. Simply put the file into your plugins folder and restart the server.

## Other

There are neither commands, permissions, nor an API.
